gitDiff:
diff --git a/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod b/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
index 3113b98..8c08c3b 100644
--- a/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
+++ b/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
@@ -205,6 +205,26 @@ Only enable the vector extension:
 
  export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v"
 
+Enable RISC-V Zbb SHA-2 override testing:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_zbb"
+
+Enable RISC-V vector SHA-256 override testing:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v_zvkb_zvknha"
+
+Enable RISC-V vector SHA-512 override testing:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v_zvkb_zvknhb"
+
+These SHA-specific overrides are intended for diagnostics and benchmarking.
+They affect runtime-dispatched implementations and do not change the
+compiler-selected base architecture or enable compile-time __riscv_zbb code
+generation. Vector length remains detected from hardware and is not overridden
+by these examples. For normal Linux execution, prefer hwprobe-detected
+capabilities over setting SHA-specific overrides. Current RISC-V SHA crypto
+dispatch covers SHA-2 paths and does not add a SHA-1 crypto dispatch path.
+
